title: Opinion: Opinion | Iran And The Actual Questions India Should Be Asking About IRIS Dena Storm
summary_full: The Iranian ship was our invitee, took part in our Fleet Review, and its personnel paraded before our President. As hosts, this put some moral burden on us to express our regrets at the tragedy that befell those who were earlier our guests.
